public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as oath witness.
appearance: Ember Stonecarve usually presents in ash-marked work leathers reinforced for heat, grit, and long shifts, with details that make their oath witness status legible before introductions begin.
manner: Keeps language exact, as if wording itself is part of the custody chain. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a oath witness still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of oath witness in and around Giant Council, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Giant Council workable through the obligations of oath witness while managing the immediate pressure of resource depletion in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must keep records, witness, or account integrity credible while people try to hurry, blur, or weaponize the paper trail. Around Giant Council, that usually means carrying resource depletion, sabotage, predatory frontier ecology without letting the role of oath witness visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Ember Stonecarve can trade precise, actionable information once the party secures or clarifies the record they protect.
Ember Stonecarve needs help resolving a missing ledger, inconsistent testimony, or tampered record tied to Giant Council.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. V33_1 additive depth pass preserved canon while strengthening at-table identity, appearance, and social motive.
public_signal: Seals, ledgers, or carefully bundled papers make record authority the first thing Ember Stonecarve communicates in public.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Giant Council: offices, toll points, ledgers, archives, or testimony desks
who_avoids_them: those hoping wording can stay vague

In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a oath witness still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Oath Witness, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Soreheim Alliance.
what_they_refuse: Ember Stonecarve refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Oath Witness too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Ember Stonecarve can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Ember Stonecarve adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Ember Stonecarve is Known locally through day-to-day work as oath witness. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Oath Witness.
